news.t: The continuing business realised revenue of DKK 263.3 million compared to DKK 261.5 million in the same period last year. Operating profit (EBIT) was DKK 22.7 million comapred to DKK 20.9 million in the same period last year.
SIXT Exceeds the Four-billion-euro Revenue Mark for the First Time: Third Record Year in a Row
The Russell 2000 is flawed — this ETF plays it in a better way for quality
Harbor Capital Advisors Expands Growing ETF Suite; Launches the Harbor AlphaEdge Large Cap-Value ETF and Harbor AlphaEdge Next Generation REITs ETF
Harbor Capital Advisors Expands Growing ETF Lineup with the Harbor AlphaEdge Small Cap Earners ETF

holdings.infoBox: EBIT is an equity ETF with a total of 651 individual holdings. The top holdings are StoneX Group stock at 1.44%, Navient at 1.22%, John Wiley & Sons at 1.19%, Diebold Nixdorf at 0.82%, and SM Energy Company at 0.76%.

overview.description: The Harbor AlphaEdge Small Cap Earners ETF (EBIT) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Harbor AlphaEdge Small Cap Earners index. The fund tracks an index comprised of small cap companies in the US selected and weighted according to their profitability. EBIT was launched on Jul 9, 2024 and is issued by Harbor.
infoTable: Harbor AlphaEdge Small Cap Earners Index
